# Add Advanced Scheduling & Regions

Add predefined time slots, regions/zones, and timetable helpers used across centers and groups.

## Tasks

- Add config for schedules and regions (zone lists).
- Implement timetable helpers and schedule pickers in the UI.
- Ensure availability checks respect time slots and region constraints.

## Rationale

Advanced scheduling is required for accurate timetables across multiple centers and regions.

Suggested labels: enhancement, frontend
